name: &cEast end of Temple Street&n
description:
&n   You've reached the east end of the &cTemple Street&n. To the north, you see &BThe
Temple of the Humans&n, while to the south is &BThe Temple of the Gnomes&n, and at
last but not least, to the east is &BThe Temple if the Advanced Races&n. This one
radiates a somewhat different, superior aura... weird thing.
